use_cases: Numeric range selection in forms and dashboards
Configuration settings with slider-based input controls
Settings panels requiring precise value adjustments
ai_summary: A minimalist styled HTML input component designed for range slider use cases. Built with React forwardRef pattern, Tailwind CSS utilities, and includes polished focus states with ring effects, disabled states, and shadow depth. Supports multiple input types (search, file, default) with type-specific styling baked in. Clean, production-ready base component for SaaS and web applications requiring form inputs.
